name: ai-research-feedback
description: Academic research review and post-review editing skills derived from canonical workflow markdown.

interface.shortDescription: Guided academic review and revision-planning workflows.
interface.longDescription: Thin Codex plugin packaging for canonical guided review and editing orchestrators, academic review workflows, shared feedback-addressed planning, grant-specific and paper-specific post-review editing specs, and the validated grant/paper post-draft edit-review loop authored in Skills/*.md. The guided orchestrators route to existing skills and do not rewrite source documents, create tracked changes, silently overwrite artifacts, or run unsupported PAP or paper-code editing loops.
defaultPrompt: Use run-review to decide which review workflow should handle this document.
Use run-editing to continue the next safe staged editing step for this artifact chain.
Review my paper for journal fit and major weaknesses.
Run a quick paper check before submission.
Review my pre-analysis plan before registration.
Normalize selected DOCX comments into feedback revision targets.
Convert a normalized feedback plan into a revision plan artifact.
Plan revisions from my saved review report.
Load writing constraints for a grant or paper revision pass.
Contextualize grant revision targets from saved editing artifacts.
Draft grant edit instructions from a saved contextualized edit plan.
Contextualize paper revision targets from saved editing artifacts.
Draft paper edit instructions from a saved contextualized edit plan.
Review drafted grant or paper edit instructions without rewriting source documents.
